global.description: The ad features a bright yellow background with food images and promotional text.
global.main_message: Promoting fast food options with a special offer.

elements.label: Solid yellow background
elements.description: A bright, solid yellow background fills the entire canvas, creating a vibrant and inviting atmosphere.

elements.label: Image of food items
elements.description: Three rectangular images of food items are displayed in the center, showcasing fresh and appealing fast food options.

elements.label: BiteRush logo
elements.description: The logo 'BiteRush' is prominently displayed at the top in bold, modern typography, conveying a sense of freshness.

elements.label: Try for free button
elements.description: A rounded button with the text 'Try for free' in a contrasting color, inviting users to take action.

elements.label: Price tag
elements.description: The price '€19.99' is displayed in a bold font, emphasizing affordability and value.

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A small, eye-catching 'SALE' badge in the top corner, indicating a special offer.

elements.label: Descriptive text
elements.description: The text 'Fast food, fast Fresh favorites nearby' is written in a clear, readable font, providing context about the service.

elements.label: Visual accents
elements.description: Subtle decorative elements enhance the overall design without distracting from the main message.
elements.text_content: Fast food, fast Fresh favorites nearby

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, banner, bright and modern, food images, promotional text
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, the main subject is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: BiteRush, SALE, Fast food, fast Fresh favorites nearby, €19.99, Try for free
